summary: Iteration 21: Ship/Vehicle deduplication and variant grouping tests. 14/14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed. Ships page shows 203 unique ship cards (down from 276 due to dedup). Vehicles page shows 12 vehicles with 1 showing variant dropdown (Ursa Medivac). Variant dropdowns work correctly for ships with cosmetic variants. Gear tab regression passed (50 weapons, 81 armor, 26 equipment).

issues: React key warnings in console for variant names (Gladius Pirate, Hammerhead 2949 Best In Show Edition, etc.) - visual editor wrapper artifacts, not actual React bugs

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed duplicate return statement in ships.py line 108-109
_dedupe_and_group_variants() correctly groups cosmetic variants under base ship
Variant suffixes properly matched: PYAM Exec, Executive Edition, Emerald, Pirate, Star Kitten, Wikelo*, etc.
ShipCard component correctly implements variant dropdown with state management
Ships.jsx search includes variant names in filter
VehicleCard component mirrors ShipCard variant functionality
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - CStone API provides ship/vehicle data dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 fixed duplicate ships (was 17 duplicates) and added variant grouping. Ships page now shows ~203 unique ships with variant dropdowns for cosmetic editions (PYAM Exec, Executive Edition, Emerald, Pirate, Star Kitten, Wikelo, CitizenCon, etc.). Vehicles page shows 12 vehicles with Ursa Medivac having variant dropdown. All gear tabs working correctly. Test user: e1agent/test123.
